appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/feature-engineering.md` to replace the stale odds-backfill note with the current event-venue extraction plus deferred-ABS behavior, and documented the remaining refresh caveat when later odds payloads omit venue metadata.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the repo's Windows-safe startup and validation workflow by directing workers to `.factory/services.yaml` `*_windows` commands and direct `.venv\Scripts\python.exe` usage when `.factory/init.sh` or generic glob commands fail on Windows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Rerun reviews for `fix-t11-defense-dated-inputs`, `fix-t12-bullpen-ir-column`, and `fix-t14-wind-sign-convention` all recorded justified deviations because the current `feature-worker` guidance still omits the Windows path already documented in `.factory/library/environment.md`, `.factory/services.yaml`, and the `data-worker` skill.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated Windows workflow observations across `fix-t11-defense-dated-inputs`, `fix-t12-bullpen-ir-column`, and `fix-t14-wind-sign-convention`.
rejectedObservations.reason: deduplicated into one systemic `feature-worker` skill recommendation

rerunContext.note: All round-1 blocking feature reviews received completed fix features and fresh scrutiny rerun reviews in round 2.
